prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 83 名持续上升至 2026 年第 71 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强；2025 年声誉评价偏负面（就业数据相关），但 2026 年声誉数据中未见云南大学明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 62 位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现显著热度助推信号；民族学 A+、生态学 A、统计学 A-，其中统计学与物理类招生的统计学、数据科学与大数据技术等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理 工科专业社会热度高热/推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度匹配，对考生吸引力较强；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 44550 人，较 2025 年 44491 人略增，竞争基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5853 名、2026 年扩招约 9%（缓解竞争）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）及理工科专业热度高，扩招效应与竞争加剧因素基本抵消，学校排名上升略占上风；预测最低位次约 6122 名，区间 5622–6622 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 10486→6956→4626→5853, showing an overall upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). After significant upward shifts in 2023 and 2024, there was a slight downward shift to 5853 in 2025, with a cumulative upward shift of about 1100 places over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5853. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Ningxia was 10 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 11 in 2025, and planned to be 12 in 2026, an increase of about 9% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026, showing continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2025, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (related to employment data), but no significant negative public opinion about Yunnan University was seen in 2026 reputation data. Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd (average), with moderate short video exposure and no significant popularity boost signal. Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, among which Statistics directly corresponds to majors like Statistics and Data Science and Big Data Technology in Physics Category admissions, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular/recommended science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly matched with the university's Physics Category admission majors, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is approximately 44,550, slightly increasing from 44,491 in 2025, with competition basically unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5853, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9% (easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and the high popularity of science and engineering majors, the expansion effect and competition intensification factors roughly offset each other, with the university's rising ranking slightly prevailing. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6122, with a range of 5622–6622.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5622–6622, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5622), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>6622), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 safety majors and strive for Tier 2 moderate majors.
